subject.description: A marketing director wearing a basic hoodie.
subject.action: Sitting in their parked car, holding the phone up to record themselves. They are ranting aggressively about 'prompting for 45 minutes' and looking directly into the lens.

setting.location: The interior of a typical car with a blurred steering wheel. Suburban street visible outside.

composition.framing: Centered selfie framing. MUST follow cropping rules: perfect headspace above the hair, no cut flesh on the holding arm, ample breathing room for the chin.

camera_settings.depth_of_field: Wide depth of field, realistic smartphone camera focus.

lighting.type: Flat, overcast natural light coming through the windshield.
lighting.color_grading: Unedited iPhone photo, completely raw, amateur, 0 aesthetic effort.

negative_prompt: Things that MUST NOT appear: professional lighting, aesthetic filters, text, watermarks, deformities, bad anatomy, cut off heads, cut flesh.
